name: LOT OF TROUBLE!
description: I'm in a LOT OF TROUBLE!
hints: You are in serious trouble with no obvious way out. This is a death/failure state.
You likely made a fatal mistake. Consider restoring a saved game and trying a different approach.
This room usually means game over. SAVE frequently to avoid losing progress.
notes: Death/failure state room. The player ends up here after certain fatal actions. No exits - must restore a save. Common causes: sailing without proper supplies, entering deadly areas unprepared.
